Vt({autoplay:!1,frameRate:30,onUpdate:s=>{let i=s.deltaTime,n=this.prevScrollX,o=this.prevScrollY,r=this.scrollX,l=this.scrollY,a=n-r,c=o-l;this.prevScrollX=r,this.prevScrollY=l,a&&(this.backwardX=n>r),c&&(this.backwardY=o>l),this.velocity=z(i>0?Math.sqrt(a*a+c*c)/i:0,5)}}).init(),this.resizeTicker=new Vt({autoplay:!1,duration:250*M.timeScale,onComplete:()=>{this.updateWindowBounds(),this.refreshScrollObservers(),this.handleScroll()}}).init(),this.wakeTicker=new speed(t){this._speed=+t,this.forEach(s=>s.playbackRate=t)}get currentTime(){let t=this.controlAnimation,s=M.timeScale;return this.completed?this.duration:t?+t.currentTime*(s===1?1:s):0}set currentTime(t){let s=t*(M.timeScale===1?1:Ht);this.forEach(i=>{!this.persist&&s>=this.duration&&i.play(),i.currentTime=s})}get progress(){return this.currentTime/this.duration}set progress(t){this.forEach(s=>s.currentTime=t*this.duration||0)}resume(){return this.paused?(this.paused=!1,this.forEach("play")):this}pause(){return this.paused?this:(this.paused=!0,this.forEach("pause"))}alternate(){return this.reversed=!this.reversed,this.forEach("reverse"),this.paused&&this.forEach("pause"),this}play(){return this.reversed&&this.alternate(),this.resume()}reverse(){return this.reversed||this.alternate(),this.resume()}seek(t,s=!1){return s&&(this.muteCallbacks=!0),t<this.duration&&(this.completed=!1),this.currentTime=t,this.muteCallbacks=!1,this.paused&&this.pause(),this}restart(){return this.completed=!1,this.seek(0,!0).resume()}commitStyles(){return this.forEach("commitStyles")}complete(){return this.seek(this.duration)}cancel(){return this.muteCallbacks=!0,this.commitStyles().forEach("cancel"),this.animations.length=0,requestAnimationFrame(()=>{this.targets.forEach(t=>{t.style.transform==="none"&&t.style.removeProperty("transform")})}),this}revert(){return r=n[o];S(r)||r===xt?i.removeProperty(Ve(o)):t.style[o]=r}t.getAttribute("style")===xt&&t.removeAttribute("style")}),this}then(t=$){let s=this.then,i=()=>{this.then=null,t(this),this.then=s,this._resolve=$};return new Promise(n=>(this._resolve=()=>n(i()),this.completed&&this._resolve(),this))}},to={animate:(e,t)=>new 0,l=`#${o.hash.split("#")[1]}`;this.scrollTo(l,r);return}}if(this.options.stopInertiaOnNavigate&&i.some(r=>n.host===r.host&&n.pathname!==r.pathname)){this.reset();return}};onPointerDown=e=>{e.button===1&&this.reset()};onVirtualScroll=e=>{if(typeof this.options.virtualScroll=="function"&&this.options.virtualScroll(e)===!1)return;let{deltaX:t,deltaY:s,event:i}=e;if(this.emitter.emit("virtual-scroll",{deltaX:t,deltaY:s,event:i}),i.ctrlKey||i.lenisStopPropagation)return;let n=i.type.includes("touch"),o=i.type.includes("wheel");this.isTouching=i.type==="touchstart"||i.type==="touchmove";let r=t===0&&s===0;if(this.options.syncTouch&&n&&i.type==="touchstart"&&r&&!this.isStopped&&!this.isLocked){this.reset();return}let a=this.options.gestureOrientation==="vertical"&&s===0||this.options.gestureOrientation==="horizontal"&&t===0;if(r||a)return;let c=i.composedPath();c=c.slice(0,c.indexOf(this.rootElement));let u=this.options.prevent,p=Math.abs(t)>=Math.abs(s)?"horizontal":"vertical";if(c.find(v=>v instanceof HTMLElement&&(typeof u=="function"&&u?.(v)||v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent")||p==="vertical"&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-vertical")||p==="horizontal"&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-horizontal")||n&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-touch")||o&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-wheel")||this.options.allowNestedScroll&&this.hasNestedScroll(v,{deltaX:t,deltaY:s}))))return;if(this.isStopped||this.isLocked){i.cancelable&&i.preventDefault();return}if(!(this.options.syncTouch&&n||this.options.smoothWheel&&o)){this.isScrolling="native",this.animate.stop(),i.lenisStopPropagation=!0;return}let T=s;this.options.gestureOrientation==="both"?T=Math.abs(s)>Math.abs(t)?s:t:this.options.gestureOrientation==="horizontal"&&(T=t),(!this.options.overscroll||this.options.infinite||this.options.wrapper!==window&&this.limit>0&&(this.animatedScroll>0&&this.animatedScroll<this.limit||this.animatedScroll===0&&s>0||this.animatedScroll===this.limit&&s<0))&&(i.lenisStopPropagation=!0),i.cancelable&&i.preventDefault();let m=n&&this.options.syncTouch,f=n&&i.type==="touchend";f&&(T=Math.sign(this.velocity)*Math.abs(this.velocity)**this.options.touchInertiaExponent),this.scrollTo(this.targetScroll+T,{programmatic:!1,...m?{lerp:f?this.options.syncTouchLerp:1}:{lerp:this.options.lerp,duration:this.options.duration,easing:this.options.easing}})};resize(){this.dimensions.resize(),this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=this.actualScroll,this.emit()}emit(){this.emitter.emit("scroll",this)}onNativeScroll=()=>{if(this._resetVelocityTimeout!==null&&(clearTimeout(this._resetVelocityTimeout),this._resetVelocityTimeout=null),this._preventNextNativeScrollEvent){this._preventNextNativeScrollEvent=!1;return}if(this.isScrolling===!1||this.isScrolling==="native"){let e=this.animatedScroll;this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=this.actualScroll,this.lastVelocity=this.velocity,this.velocity=this.animatedScroll-e,this.direction=Math.sign(this.animatedScroll-e),this.isStopped||(this.isScrolling="native"),this.emit(),this.velocity!==0&&(this._resetVelocityTimeout=setTimeout(()=>{this.lastVelocity=this.velocity,this.velocity=0,this.isScrolling=!1,this.emit()},400))}};reset(){this.isLocked=!1,this.isScrolling=!1,this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=this.actualScroll,this.lastVelocity=this.velocity=0,this.animate.stop()}start(){if(this.isStopped){if(this.options.autoToggle){this.rootElement.style.removeProperty("overflow");return}this.internalStart()}}internalStart(){this.isStopped&&(this.reset(),this.isStopped=!1,this.emit())}stop(){if(!this.isStopped){if(this.options.autoToggle){this.rootElement.style.setProperty("overflow","clip");return}this.internalStop()}}internalStop(){this.isStopped||(this.reset(),this.isStopped=!0,this.emit())}raf=e=>{let t=e-(this.time||e);this.time=e,this.animate.advance(t*.001),this.options.autoRaf&&(this._rafId=requestAnimationFrame(this.raf))};scrollTo(e,{offset:t=0,immediate:s=!1,lock:i=!1,programmatic:n=!0,lerp:o=n?this.options.lerp:void 0,duration:r=n?this.options.duration:void 0,easing:l=n?this.options.easing:void 0,onStart:a,onComplete:c,force:u=!1,userData:p}={}){if((this.isStopped||this.isLocked)&&!u)return;let d=e,T=t;if(typeof d=="string"&&["top","left","start","#"].includes(d))d=0;else if(typeof d=="string"&&["bottom","right","end"].includes(d))d=this.limit;else{let m=null;if(typeof d=="string"?(m=document.querySelector(d),m||(d==="#top"?d=0:console.warn("Lenis: Target not found",d))):d instanceof HTMLElement&&d?.nodeType&&(m=d),m){if(this.options.wrapper!==window){let f=this.rootElement.getBoundingClientRect();T-=this.isHorizontal?f.left:f.top}let h=m.getBoundingClientRect();d=(this.isHorizontal?h.left:h.top)+this.animatedScroll}}if(typeof d=="number"){if(d+=T,d=Math.round(d),this.options.infinite){if(n){this.targetScroll=this.animatedScroll=this.scroll;let m=d-this.animatedScroll;m>this.limit/2?d-=this.limit:m<-this.limit/2&&(d+=this.limit)}}else d=Ro(0,d,this.limit);if(d===this.targetScroll){a?.(this),c?.(this);return}if(this.userData=p??{},s){this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=d,this.setScroll(this.scroll),this.reset(),this.preventNextNativeScrollEvent(),this.emit(),c?.(this),this.userData={},requestAnimationFrame(()=>{this.dispatchScrollendEvent()});return}n||(this.targetScroll=d),typeof r=="number"&&typeof l!="function"?l=No:typeof l=="function"&&typeof r!="number"&&(r=1),this.animate.fromTo(this.animatedScroll,d,{duration:r,easing:l,lerp:o,onStart:()=>{i&&(this.isLocked=!0),this.isScrolling="smooth",a?.(this)},onUpdate:(m,h)=>{this.isScrolling="smooth",this.lastVelocity=this.velocity,this.velocity=m-this.animatedScroll,this.direction=Math.sign(this.velocity),this.animatedScroll=m,this.setScroll(this.scroll),n&&(this.targetScroll=m),h||this.emit(),h&&(this.reset(),this.emit(),c?.(this),this.userData={},requestAnimationFrame(()=>{this.dispatchScrollendEvent()}),this.preventNextNativeScrollEvent())}})}}preventNextNativeScrollEvent(){this._preventNextNativeScrollEvent=!0,requestAnimationFrame(()=>{this._preventNextNativeScrollEvent=!1})}hasNestedScroll(e,{deltaX:t,deltaY:s}){let i=Date.now();e._lenis||(e._lenis={});let n=e._lenis,o,r,l,a,c,u,p,d,T,m;if(i-(n.time??0)>2e3){n.time=Date.now();let I=window.getComputedStyle(e);if(n.computedStyle=I,o=["auto","overlay","scroll"].includes(I.overflowX),r=["auto","overlay","scroll"].includes(I.overflowY),c=["auto"].includes(I.overscrollBehaviorX),u=["auto"].includes(I.overscrollBehaviorY),n.hasOverflowX=o,n.hasOverflowY=r,!(o||r))return!1;p=e.scrollWidth,d=e.scrollHeight,T=e.clientWidth,m=e.clientHeight,l=p>T,a=d>m,n.isScrollableX=l,n.isScrollableY=a,n.scrollWidth=p,n.scrollHeight=d,n.clientWidth=T,n.clientHeight=m,n.hasOverscrollBehaviorX=c,n.hasOverscrollBehaviorY=u}else l=n.isScrollableX,a=n.isScrollableY,o=n.hasOverflowX,r=n.hasOverflowY,p=n.scrollWidth,d=n.scrollHeight,T=n.clientWidth,m=n.clientHeight,c=n.hasOverscrollBehaviorX,u=n.hasOverscrollBehaviorY;if(!(o&&l||r&&a))return!1;let h=Math.abs(t)>=Math.abs(s)?"horizontal":"vertical",f,v,w,x,b,_;if(h==="horizontal")f=Math.round(e.scrollLeft),v=p-T,w=t,x=o,b=l,_=c;else if(h==="vertical")f=Math.round(e.scrollTop),v=d-m,w=s,x=r,b=a,_=u;else return!1;return!_&&(f>=v||f<=0)?!0:(w>0?f<v:f>0)&&x&&b}get rootElement(){return this.options.wrapper===window?document.documentElement:this.options.wrapper}get limit(){return this.options.naiveDimensions?this.isHorizontal?this.rootElement.scrollWidth-this.rootElement.clientWidth:this.rootElement.scrollHeight-this.rootElement.clientHeight:this.dimensions.limit[this.isHorizontal?"x":"y"]}get isHorizontal(){return this.options.orientation==="horizontal"}get actualScroll(){let e=this.options.wrapper;return this.isHorizontal?e.scrollX??e.scrollLeft:e.scrollY??e.scrollTop}get scroll(){return this.options.infinite?Dr(this.animatedScroll,this.limit):this.animatedScroll}get progress(){return this.limit===0?1:this.scroll/this.limit}get isScrolling(){return this._isScrolling}set isScrolling(e){this._isScrolling!==e&&(this._isScrolling=e,this.updateClassName())}get isStopped(){return this._isStopped}set isStopped(e){this._isStopped!==e&&(this._isStopped=e,this.updateClassName())}get isLocked(){return this._isLocked}set isLocked(e){this._isLocked!==e&&(this._isLocked=e,this.updateClassName())}get isSmooth(){return this.isScrolling==="smooth"}get className(){let e="lenis";return this.options.autoToggle&&(e+=" lenis-autoToggle"),this.isStopped&&(e+=" lenis-stopped"),this.isLocked&&(e+=" lenis-locked"),this.isScrolling&&(e+=" lenis-scrolling"),this.isScrolling==="smooth"&&(e+=" lenis-smooth"),e}updateClassName(){this.cleanUpClassName(),this.rootElement.className=`${this.rootElement.className} ${this.className}`.trim()}cleanUpClassName(){this.rootElement.className=this.rootElement.className.replace(/lenis(-\w+)?/g,"").trim()}};var gs=[],ms=new Set,ti=null;function Ao(){ti=new Po({infinite:!0,smoothTouch:!0,syncTouch:!0,touchMultiplier:1.5});function e(r){ti.raf(r),requestAnimationFrame(e)}requestAnimationFrame(e),ti.scrollTo(0,{immediate:!0});let t=!1;if(t){o();return}let s=Oi(.67,0,.27,1),i=$i("body");Te({defaults:{duration:700,ease:s}}).add(".intro_title",{translateX:(r,l)=>l===0?["100%","0%"]:["-100%","0%"],duration:500,delay:250},0).add(".intro_holder video",{scale:[0,.5]},750).add(".intro_center",{translateX:(r,l)=>{let a=r.getBoundingClientRect(),c=parseFloat(getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).fontSize)*.875;return l===0?-(a.left-c):window.innerWidth-a.right-c}},750).add(".intro_holder video",{scale:1}).add(".intro",{backgroundColor:"rgba(255,255,255,0)",duration:250}).call(()=>{let r=document.querySelector(".intro_holder video"),l=document.querySelector(".home_cms--link");!r||!l||(i.record(),l.prepend(r),r.classList.add("active"),i.animate({duration:1e3,ease:s,onComplete:()=>{Xt(".intro",{opacity:0,duration:600}),t=!0,o()}}))});function o(){document.querySelector(".home_list").querySelectorAll(".home_item").forEach((a,c)=>{let u=c%2===0,p=Di({target:a,repeat:!1,onEnter:()=>{t&&(ms.has(a)||(ms.add(a),Xt(a,{clipPath:u?["inset(0% 100% 0%)","inset(0% 0% 0% 0%)"]:["inset(0% 0% 100% 100%)","inset(0% 0% 0% 0%)"],duration:750,ease:s})))}});gs.push(p)})}document.querySelectorAll(".home_cms--link").forEach(r=>{let l=r.querySelector(".home_flw--crs");r.addEventListener("mousemove",a=>{let c=r.getBoundingClientRect(),u=l.getBoundingClientRect(),p=u.width/2,d=u.height/2,T=Math.min(Math.max(a.clientX-c.left,p),c.width-p),m=Math.min(Math.max(a.clientY-c.top,d),c.height-d);l.style.transform=`translate(${T-p}px, ${m-d}px)`}),r.addEventListener("mouseenter",()=>{Xt(l,{opacity:1,duration:800,ease:"inOut(1.68)"})}),r.addEventListener("mouseleave",()=>{Xt(l,{opacity:0,duration:800,ease:"inOut(1.68)"})})})}function Hr(){gs.forEach(e=>e.revert()),gs=[],document.querySelectorAll(".home_item").forEach((e,t)=>{let s=t%2===0;e.style.clipPath=s?"inset(0% 100% 100% 0%)":"inset(0% 0% 100% 100%)"})}function Io(){ti.destroy(),gs.forEach(e=>e.revert()),gs=[],ms.clear(),document.querySelectorAll(".home_list:not(.is-clone) .home_item").forEach((e,t)=>{let s=t%2===0;e.style.clipPath=s?"inset(0% 100% 100% 0%)":"inset(0% 0% 100% 100%)"}),Hr()}function ko(){let e=[".about_p",".about_work",".about_text",".about_social"],t=Te(),s=1e3,i=10,n=0;e.forEach(T=>{qe.$(T).forEach(m=>{let o=document.querySelector(".section.about"),r=document.querySelector(".i-blob"),l=Li(r,{x:{duration:800,ease:"out(3)"},y:{duration:800,ease:"out(3)"},rotate:{duration:600,ease:"linear",unit:"rad"}}),a=0,c=0,u=Math.PI,p=.5,d=o.getBoundingClientRect();window.addEventListener("resize",()=>d=o.getBoundingClientRect()),o.addEventListener("mousemove",T=>{let{width:m,height:h,left:f,top:v}=d,w=(T.clientX-f-m/2)*p,x=(T.clientY-v-h/2)*p;l.x(w),l.y(x);let b=Math.atan2(T.clientY-v-h/2,T.clientX-f-m/2),_=b-c;a+=_>u?_-2*u:_<-u?_+2*u:_,c=b,l.rotate(a*p)})}function Do(){let e=[".work_title"],t=Te(),s=1e3,i=10,n=0;e.forEach(d=>{qe.$(d).forEach(T=>{let h=l==="all"||m.getAttribute("filter-lp-field")===l,f=m.closest(".work_item");f.classList.toggle("off",!h),f.querySelector(".work_title").classList.toggle("off",!h)})})}),u.forEach(d=>{d.querySelector(".work_title")?.classList.remove("is-active");let T=d.querySelector(".work_link"),m=d.querySelectorAll(".work_thumb");T&&(T.style.display="none"),m.forEach(h=>h.style.opacity="0")}),u.forEach(d=>{d.addEventListener("mouseover",()=>{d.classList.contains("off")||d!==p&&(p&&(p.querySelector(".work_title")?.classList.remove("is-active"),Xt(p.querySelectorAll(".work_thumb"),{opacity:0,duration:300,ease:"outQuad"}),Xt(p.querySelector(".work_link"),{display:"none",pointerEvents:"none",duration:0})),d.querySelector(".work_title")?.classList.add("is-active"),Xt(d.querySelector(".work_link"),{display:"block",pointerEvents:"auto",duration:0}),Xt(d.querySelectorAll(".work_thumb"),{opacity:1,duration:300,ease:"outQuad"}),p=d)},{signal:c})})}function n=s.querySelector("a").getAttribute("href");if(window.location.pathname===n){let o=e[(i+1)%t];o.style.display="block"}}),document.querySelectorAll("video").forEach(s=>{s.muted=!0,s.playsInline=!0,s.loop=!0})}"scrollRestoration"in history&&(history.scrollRestoration="manual");function Fo(){document.querySelector("#time").textContent=new Date().toLocaleTimeString("en-GB",{timeZone:"Europe/London",hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"})}Fo();setInterval(Fo,1e3);var Ji=class extends de{onLeave({from:t,done:s}){t.animate([{opacity:1},{opacity:0}],{duration:400,easing:"ease",fill:"forwards"}).finished.then(s)}onEnter({to:t,done:s}){t.animate([{opacity:0},{opacity:1}],{duration:400,easing:"ease",fill:"forwards"}).finished.then(s)}},Ki=class extends ue{initialLoad(){this.onEnter()}onEnter(){this.content.querySelectorAll("video[autoplay]").forEach(s=>{s.play().catch(()=>{})}),document.body.scrollTop=0,document.documentElement.scrollTop=0,window.scrollTo(0,0);let t=window.location.pathname;t==="/"&&Ao(),t.includes("about")&&ko(),t.includes("/work")&&Do(),t.includes("work/")&&Oo()}onLeaveCompleted(){window.location.pathname==="/"&&Io()}},id=new De({transitions:{default:Ji},renderers:{default:Ki}});})();
